channel.title: Politics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from Politics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Bill Clinton Faces Grilling From Lawmakers Over His Connections to Jeffrey Epstein
item.description: Former President Bill Clinton is testifying Friday before members of Congress investigating convicted sex offender Jeffrey Epstein, answering for his ...

item.title: JD Vance: No Endless War as Trump Weighs Iran Strikes
item.description: Vice President JD Vance reportedly said there's "no chance" military strikes on Iran would result in the U.S. becoming involved in a prolonged war.

item.title: Fed in Closed-Door Clash With DOJ Over Powell Probe
item.description: The Federal Reserve is mounting a behind-closed-doors legal fight against Justice Department subpoenas tied to U.S. Attorney Jeanine Pirro's criminal ...

item.title: Newsom staffer who told California reporter to 'f--- off' is raking in massive taxpayer-funded salary
item.description: State records show that the communications director for Gov. Gavin Newsom earns a hefty six-figure salary as critics slam him for telling a reporter t...

item.title: LA Firefighter Retaliated Against for Noting Lachman Fire Wasn't Extinguished, Leading to Palisades Blaze
Bill Clinton faces high-stakes House grilling in Epstein probe after Hillary blasts 'fishing expedition'
item.description: House Oversight Republicans prepare to grill Bill Clinton in Chappaqua on Friday. Chairman James Comer expects the deposition to last longer than Hill...

item.title: Vance says 'no chance' US will get into prolonged Middle East war amid Iran tensions
item.description: Vice President JD Vance told The Washington Post that "there is no chance" the U.S. will get into a protracted war in the Middle East as tensions rise...

item.title: Sources: US Envoy Barrack Meets Iraq's Ex-Prime Minister Maliki
item.description: U.S. envoy Tom Barrack met former Iraqi Prime Minister Nouri al-Maliki, the Shiite alliance's candidate for premier, on Friday, two sources familiar w...

item.title: Swalwell campaign sets off alarm bells after accepting $25K donation from CCP-tied lawyer: 'Outrageous'
item.description: Eric Swalwellâs bid for governor gets another boost from a CCP-linked donor after Fox News Digital previously highlighted his ties to the CCP bankroll...

item.title: Where Iranâs ballistic missiles can reach â and how close they are to the US
item.description: Trump warns Iran missiles could "soon reach" U.S. as tensions escalate. Iran's current arsenal threatens American forces across Middle East bases.

item.title: AI Is Already Embedded in Military Systems - Now the Fight Is Over How Far It Can Go
Mayor Karen Bass Feigns Ignorance of the LA Skid Row Dog Crisis, So PETA Begs Gavin Newsom to Intervene
Deadline Nears as Anthropic Defies Pentagon's AI Demands
item.description: A public showdown between the Trump administration and Anthropic is hitting an impasse as military officials demand the artificial intelligence compan...

item.title: Democrats Eat Their Own: Outsider Candidates Blast DCCC for Rigging 2026 Primaries, 'Narrowing Democracy'
